title: Hagen Lamprecht and Peter Benedict Schildberg join as doctoral researchers
description: DIGITX welcomes two doctoral researchers: Hagen Lamprecht, building autonomous agentic research systems for healthcare, and Peter Benedict Schildberg, developing temporal knowledge graphs for clinical data.

title: BREZN project funded by BZKF
description: The Bavarian Center for Cancer Research (BZKF) funds BREZN, a collaboration across Bavarian university hospitals to validate GALAH, the lab's agentic AI viewer that standardizes lung cancer TNM staging from imaging, clinical reports, and guideline-based reasoning.

title: ARCHE project funded by ICPO Foundation
description: ICPO Foundation awards funding for ARCHE, an AI-driven curation and harmonization engine for structuring multimodal theranostics data.
